label: PASS
rationale: Before the reset, Locking reported ReEncryptState ACTIVE and ContOnReset as an empty set. The supplied ContOnReset rule says an empty set sets TPer_Reset_Stop for any reset and sets ReEncryptState to PAUSED. The gen_status source maps an active reset stop to value 34, matching the target output PAUSED with 34.

label: FAIL
rationale: Before the reset, Locking reported ReEncryptState ACTIVE and ContOnReset as an empty set. The supplied ContOnReset rule requires any reset to stop re-encryption and set ReEncryptState to PAUSED, and the gen_status source maps this active reset-stop condition to value 34. The target output instead remains ACTIVE with status 0.

label: PASS
rationale: Before the reset, Locking reported ReEncryptState PENDING and ContOnReset as an empty set. The supplied ContOnReset rule says an empty set stops re-encryption for any reset and sets ReEncryptState to PAUSED. The gen_status source maps a pending reset stop to value 5, matching the target output PAUSED with 5.
